overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a player character walking through a dystopian industrial yard with steam vents and graffiti, traversing a dark underpass, and emerging into a bright urban plaza dominated by a futuristic tower with gold vertical stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial yard with steam vents and graffiti

events.description: passes by NPC sitting on concrete blocks to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial yard toward a dark passage ahead

notable_agents.action: sitting on a concrete block beside the path
standing near concrete barriers in the yard

entered.detail: large green industrial structure emitting white steam
stack of cinder blocks forming a low wall
dark wall with white painted text reading KURT 4 PREZ
large cylindrical metal pipes stacked horizontally

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit industrial yard with steam rising from large green structures. The camera moves forward past concrete barriers and a wall with 'KURT 4 PREZ' graffiti. A few NPCs are scattered about, including one sitting on concrete blocks to the right. The ground is dirt with patches of dry grass.

events.description: enters dark narrow passage leaving the open industrial yard behind
ambient light drops significantly as moving deeper into the enclosed tunnel

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the dark corridor toward faint light visible at the far end

entered.detail: opening to a narrow dark passage between concrete walls
tall gray concrete wall forming the left boundary of the passage
tall gray concrete wall forming the right boundary of the passage
dark ceiling with exposed pipes and industrial fixtures

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, dark underpass with concrete walls on both sides and an industrial ceiling overhead. The lighting is very low, creating a shadowy corridor. The camera moves steadily forward toward a distant light at the end of the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with exposed infrastructure transitioning to light

events.description: gradual brightening as approaching the exit, with natural light becoming visible ahead
futuristic tower with gold stripes becomes visible through the end of the passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered passage with increasing light ahead, approaching the exit

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead toward the bright exit

entered.detail: thick bundles of black cables hanging from the ceiling
large cylindrical concrete column supporting the overhead structure
tall modern building with distinctive gold vertical stripes visible through the passage end

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered walkway with exposed electrical cables and concrete pillars. The environment transitions from dark to light as the exit approaches, revealing a futuristic tower with gold vertical stripes in the distance. A silhouetted figure walks ahead toward the bright opening.

events.description: exits covered passage into bright outdoor plaza with full sky visibility
passes by pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the large futuristic tower entrance

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera then passing by on the right

entered.detail: modern building with glass dome structure visible in the distance
large wall with monochrome mural or advertisement
patches of dry yellow grass growing between concrete slabs

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark passage into a bright, open urban plaza under a partly cloudy sky. The futuristic tower with gold stripes dominates the view, now much closer. The ground is concrete with patches of dry grass. A pedestrian walks past the camera as it approaches the tower entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit industrial yard through a dark underpass and into a bright, futuristic urban plaza. It begins by moving past steam-venting green structures and graffiti-covered walls in a gritty yard with scattered NPCs. As the camera advances, the environment narrows into a shadowy concrete underpass with an industrial ceiling, creating a dark corridor that leads toward a distant light. The scene then shifts through a covered walkway of exposed cables and pillars, where the lighting gradually brightens to reveal a towering structure with gold vertical stripes in the distance. Finally, the camera emerges from the passage into an open plaza under a cloudy sky, approaching the entrance of the gold-striped tower as pedestrians pass by on the concrete ground.
